steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content: The triangles are similar in the order triangle CAE to triangle CBD. That means the corresponding vertices are C to C, A to B, and E to D.

steps.title: Match the angle measures
steps.content: Corresponding angles in similar triangles are congruent, so angle CAE equals angle CBD. The side scale factor $AE=26(BD)$ does not change angle measures.

steps.title: Use the given angle
steps.content: Since angle CBD is $57^{\circ}$, angle CAE is also $57^{\circ}$. The answer is C.
